notes: US-based post-trade financial services holding company. Operates DTC, NSCC, and FICC subsidiaries — the central depositories and clearing corporations for the US securities markets. Publishes cybersecurity and operational-risk requirements that participants (banks, broker-dealers) must follow. Documents are member-only / NDA-protected.

data.notes: Member-only / NDA. Includes Sheltered Harbor and various financial-sector cyber-resilience programs.
